name: The Master of Cheongsam
overview: After a fallout with his teacher and facing oppression from seniors, Lu Zhiyuan leaves Beiping for Shanghai, where his dedication earns him recognition. When war breaks out in Beiping, he returns, vowing never to create cheongsams for the Japanese. With his talent, he rises to become one of China's top costume designers.

trailers.title: 【DRAMA SERIES】THE MASTER OF CHEONGSAM 一剪芳华 TRAILER
